per_turn_leaks.student_message: I want to make sure we don't miss anything important. When these episodes happen, does your body react in any other way?
per_turn_leaks.patient_response: Yes, I've had a low-grade fever, around 38.2°C (100.8°F), that's been intermittent and worse in the evenings, and I've also been experiencing night sweats, soaking through my pajamas every night for the past few nights.

per_turn_leaks.student_message: Thank you for sharing that. I really appreciate your honesty. Does the discomfort stay in one place or does it spread anywhere?
per_turn_leaks.patient_response: The right-sided chest pain has been sharp, worse with deep breathing and coughing, which is making me a bit worried about something more serious going on. It's not just localized to my chest, but I've also noticed that it radiates slightly to my back when I'm coughing.

per_turn_leaks.student_message: I hate to ask this, but it's really important — has anyone in your family had serious health problems?
per_turn_leaks.patient_response: My mother has asthma, which has been a concern for her over the years. I've also heard that my maternal grandmother passed away from lung cancer, so there might be some underlying genetic factors at play.
